alkylation reagent: we used serially diluted 955 to compete with iodoacetamide (IA)-alkyne
cleavage agent: using sequencing grade modified porcine trypsin
collision energy: The HCD fragmentation energy (N)CE/stepped NCE was set to 28
enrichment method: TurboID assay is a powerful proximity labeling method
fragmentation method: The MS/MS was acquired according to standard conditions established in the lab.
instrument: performed on a Thermo Scientific Q Exactive HF Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: The EASY Spray source operated with a spray voltage of 1.5 KV
